name: @firstpick/pi-skill-backup-manager
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for backup health checks, restore testing, NAS/Gitea backup integrity, 3-2-1 strategy review, backup script audits, or verifying repositories and archives can be restored safely.
description_zh: 代理应在备份健康检查、恢复测试、NAS/Gitea 备份完整性、3-2-1 策略审查、备份脚本审计或验证存储库和档案可安全恢复时调用此技能
